Name: UShapeComponent
Description: ShapeComponent is a PrimitiveComponent that is represented by a simple geometrical shape (sphere, capsule, box, etc).

Variables.Name: ShapeColor
Variables.Description: Color used to draw the shape.

Variables.Name: bDrawOnlyIfSelected
Variables.Description: Only show this component if the actor is selected

Variables.Name: bShouldCollideWhenPlacing
Variables.Description: If true it allows Collision when placing even if collision is not enabled

Variables.Name: bDynamicObstacle
Variables.Description: If set, shape will be exported for navigation as dynamic modifier instead of using regular collision data
